verses.1: I will exalt you, my God, the King.
verses.2: Every day I will praise you.
verses.3: Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised!
verses.4: One generation will commend your works to another,
verses.5: I will meditate on the glorious majesty of your honor,
verses.6: Men will speak of the might of your awesome acts.
verses.7: They will utter the memory of your great goodness,
verses.9: The LORD is good to all.
verses.10: All your works will give thanks to you, LORD.
verses.11: They will speak of the glory of your kingdom,
verses.12: to make known to the sons of men his mighty acts,
verses.13: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom.
verses.14: The LORD upholds all who fall,
verses.15: The eyes of all wait for you.
verses.17: The LORD is righteous in all his ways,
verses.18: The LORD is near to all those who call on him,
verses.19: He will fulfill the desire of those who fear him.
verses.20: The LORD preserves all those who love him,
verses.21: My mouth will speak the praise of the LORD.
